Game.Title: Zidane: Football Generation

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\All-Star Baseball 2000 (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Utilizando equipos y jugadores con licencia real de la temporada 1999, ALL-STAR BASEBALL 2000 te reta a llevar a tu equipo favorito de la MLB a una victoria en la Serie Mundial. ALL-STAR BASEBALL 2000 ofrece una amplia variedad de opciones de juego. Si crees que tienes lo necesario para jugar una temporada completa de acción de la MLB, prueba el modo Temporada. Si te gusta ir al grano, ve directamente a los Playoffs. Practica tu swing en el modo de práctica de bateo, y luego demuestra tus habilidades en el Derby de Home Run! Cuando estés listo, sal al campo con los grandes del deporte en un juego de estrellas. Elige entre el campo manual y el automático. ¿Necesitas esperar a otro día para la carrera por el banderín? No hay problema. Guarda el progreso de tu equipo con la práctica función de contraseña.
Game.Title: All-Star Baseball 2000

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Test Drive 6 (E) (M5) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Test Drive 6 ofrece 11 circuitos que tienen lugar en todo el mundo. De París a Tahití pasando por Egipto, conduce todo lo que quieras con cuidado de evitar a los civiles y la policía en tu camino. Con el dinero recaudado durante las carreras, optimiza tu vehículo y compra otros más eficientes.
Game.Title: Test Drive 6

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Elevator Action EX (E) (M5) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Elevator Action EX has the same gameplay style as the original, only with a few differences. As Mike, Guy, or Sarah, you must obtain all secret documents, keys, and discs that are behind closed doors marked with a white exclamation mark. There are also doors with question marks which have different weapons behind them, as well as an extra health bar. Once you obtained all the items within the building, you will have to go through the building in the opposite direction twice before facing all your opponents in one room. Once you have done this, you move on to the next one, that has tougher enemies than the last one. You will always start at each building with the same weapon.
Game.Title: Elevator Action EX

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Dragon's Lair (U) (M6) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Los jugadores controlan a Dirk el Intrépido, un caballero en su misión de rescatar a la princesa Daphne del malvado dragón Singe. Deben encontrar el camino a través del castillo de un mago loco, luchando y esquivando trampas todo el camino.
Esta conversión del clásico arcade de 1983 está casi completa, menos una o dos escenas de animación, así como algunos archivos de sonido, reemplazados por sus versiones MIDI. Pero la jugabilidad sigue siendo la misma, presiona los botones correctos para continuar a lo largo de la historia, hasta que Dirk derrote a todo el mal que se interponga en su misión de salvar a la Princesa Daphne.
Game.Title: Dragon's Lair

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Star Wars Episode I - Racer (UE) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Basado en las escenas de carreras de vainas de Star Wars Episodio I: La Amenaza Fantasma, tu misión como el joven Anakin Skywalker o como uno de los extraños personajes de la galaxia es competir, sobrevivir y ganar en el desafío de alta velocidad de las carreras de vainas.
Cada personaje tiene un Pod único que puede mejorarse con los créditos que ganes después de cada carrera. Termina el primero para ganar más prestigio y compite en pistas más grandes y desafiantes, incluida la ya famosa carrera por las dunas de arena de Tatooine que determinó el destino de muchas vidas.
Game.Title: Star Wars Episode I: Racer

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Diva Starz - Mall Mania (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Únete a las Divas Alexa, Nikki, Tia y Summer en esta colección portátil de 6 minijuegos, de camino al desfile de moda. Los minijuegos incluyen: "The Scooter Spot", que es una simple rampa que golpea/evita obstáculos para cruzar al centro comercial. "The Fashion Spot", un juego de clasificación de cintas transportadoras, donde arrojas artículos en cajas. "The Music Spot", un juego de ritmo de Dance Dance Revolution simplificado. "The Snack Spot", una Torre de Hanoi se encuentra con un helado. "The Pet Shop", donde atrapas a una mascota en un simple laberinto. Y finalmente, "The Style Spot", donde vistes a tu Diva y combinas conjuntos de ropa.
Game.Title: Diva Starz: Mall Mania

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Rats! (U) (M2) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
El Sr. Raz fue un terrible asesino a sueldo. Por suerte, encontró a su novia Loretta Mozzarella y detuvo sus asesinatos. Pasando una nueva hoja en su vida, él y Loretta se mudaron al campo y para vivir en una granja. Sin embargo, cuando la mafia de Don Marlon Mozzarella se enteró de que su hija había desaparecido, se enfureció y ordenó a sus matones que fueran a buscarla. Entonces, si el Sr. Raz quiere volver a ver a su novia, no tiene más remedio que tomar su arma nuevamente y dirigirse a la ciudad.
El juego es un juego de plataformas de desplazamiento lateral, en el que debes abrirte camino a través de 5 mundos, cada uno de los cuales abarca 15 niveles. Tienes que recolectar una cierta cantidad de piezas de comida antes de que el temporizador llegue a cero para avanzar por los niveles, mientras te deshaces de los enemigos y evitas los obstáculos en tu camino.
Game.Title: Rats!

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Gex - Enter the Gecko (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Una conversión del título de plataforma 3D, presenta todos los mismos niveles reducidos en la pantalla de Game Boy Color. Gex es absorbido por su televisor y debe explorar todos los niveles de estilo de televisión, encontrar los controles remotos y salvar el mundo de la televisión de Rez, quien planea apoderarse de las redes de televisión del mundo y regresar a casa. Cada nivel se basa en un género televisivo popular, como el terror, la ciencia ficción y la comedia, y se mencionan programas y películas conocidos a lo largo del camino.
Game.Title: Gex: Enter the Gecko

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Razor Freestyle Scooter (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: If they're so cool in real life, can you even imagine what they can do in a video game? The popular razor scooters now have their own GBC title, and it's one intense ride. Choose your rig from a variety of available scooters, and then head out to rescue your friends from the clutches an evil robot named Norton. Your style and skills are the only things that can save the day, so get moving! There are 10 cool characters to play as each with unique abilities and shortcomings and 45 cool maneuvers to pull off. Packed with awesome graphics and realistic action, RAZOR FREESTYLE SCOOTER challenges you to grind ledges, jump barrels, and perform tricks like no-footers, tailwhips, and supermen. Each level is loaded with difficult obstacles and hidden bonuses, and the controls are refreshingly simple to learn. If you're looking for a great take on this popular new sport, you've found it. Play alone or take on a friend.
Game.Title: Razor: Freestyle Scooter

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Armorines - Project S.W.A.R.M. (E) (M2) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Experimenta la emoción y la acción de estar solo contra una invasión alienígena en las Armas: Proyecto S.W.A.R.M. para Game Boy Color. Eres una sola Armadura contra toda una raza de viciosos bichos alienígenas empeñados en destruir toda la vida humana en Venus. Juega a través de seis niveles superiores llenos de acción y puzzles. Ten cuidado, porque el enemigo es inteligente y no dudará en usar la estrategia para derrotarte. Utiliza cinco armas diferentes, incluyendo el láser, el lanzallamas y el rifle de plasma para hacer frente al implacable asalto. Ábrete camino a través de una variedad de niveles hasta la nave nodriza, ¡donde pondrás fin a esta invasión para siempre! ARMARINAS: El proyecto S.W.A.R.M. cuenta con una amplia variedad de enemigos bien detallados, junto con gráficos de gran colorido que te llevarán directamente a la acción. Utiliza la función de contraseña para continuar la lucha otro día!
Game.Title: Armorines: Project S.W.A.R.M.

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Gameboy Wars 2 (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Game Boy Wars 2 is a Turn Based Strategy game for the Game Boy Color. It is a Japan-only part of the Nintendo Wars series.
Game Boy Wars 2, the second of the Game Boy Wars sequels by Hudson Soft, was released on November 20, 1998. The CPU's decision-making algorithm has once again been improved and the game now displays which spaces the player can move into or attack when they're moving a unit, allowing for clearer decision making process for the player. There are 54 new maps in Game Boy Wars 2.
Game.Title: Game Boy Wars 2

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Konami GB Collection Vol.2 (E) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
4 more classic Konami titles bundled on the one cart.
On this occasion, the games are Parodius (an R-type style shooter with plenty of humor and crazy characters); Block Game (much the same as Tetris, although here falling shapes must be shot at by your ship at the bottom of the screen, to form a type of square shape. By doing so, the blocks are removed from the screen); Track and Field (a collection of track and field events including the 100m sprint, hurdles, long jump, triple jump and more); and finally, Frogger, the classic top-down puzzle game where the aim is to move your little frog across the road and the pond, dodging cars and crocodiles along the way to the lilipad.
Again, all games can be played in color on the GBC, or in black and white on the original Game Boy console.
Game.Title: Konami GB Collection: Vol.2

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Tiny Toon Adventures - Dizzy's Candy Quest (E) (M6) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
This is a puzzle solving game in which the player (as Dizzy from the Tiny Toons Cartoon) has to collect and return different types of candy to a friendly robot that needs the candy to free himself from Montana Max.
The game is divided in 5 worlds (The Studios, Ice World, City, Gogo Dodo's world, Looniversity) with varying numbers of sublevels.
Getting to the candy is made complicated by conveyor belts, trap doors and fans as well as dissolving bridges etc. To add to the trouble, clones of popular Tiny Toon characters (Plucky Hamton, Furrball etc.) are programmed to attack the player.
Extras can be collected for extra energy, time etc. The game is presented from a top down perspective. Estimated playtime approx. 30 hours.
Game.Title: Tiny Toon Adventures: Dizzy's Candy Quest

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\NFL Blitz 2001 (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: If you're a football fanatic looking for arcade-style gridiron action, then NFL BLITZ 2001 from Midway is right up your alley. Take all the tiresome rules and regulations of standard football and throw them out the window BLITZ is fast, furious, and out of control. Real-life NFL stars are modeled here in a brutish, cartoon-inspired fashion and their burly physiques are perfect for inflicting damage on your opponents. Listen and laugh at humorous commentary from the in-game announcer and garner helpful hints from the sexy cheerleaders as you attack your way upfield towards the goal line. And you can savor all the bone-crushing pigskin mayhem again and again in a helmet-cracking replay mode. You'll watch in awe as your team catches fire after a series of excellent plays. Compete in four stadiums new to the franchise like the "Stadium of the Future," watch the action from a range of angles (including Blimp view), go head-to-head in Single-Player competition, and much more. Taunting, tackles, and touchdowns are all part of the "First -and-Goal Frenzy" of NFL BLITZ 2001.
Game.Title: NFL Blitz 2001

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Toki Tori (U) (M5) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Recién nacido de su caparazón, Toki Tori descubre que su familia ha sido secuestrada. Por suerte para él, incluso siendo tan pequeño, tiene muchas habilidades bajo la manga, por lo que se propone encontrar a su familia.
Un mezcla entre rompecabezas y acción, debes usar las habilidades disponibles para avanzar a través de 60 niveles, separados en 4 mundos de 15 niveles. Las habilidades incluyen construir escaleras para cruzar huecos que no puedes atravesar con tu salto, deformar a otras áreas del nivel o construir huecos para que los enemigos caigan.
Game.Title: Toki Tori

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\All-Star Baseball 2001 (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: ¿Estás listo para ser un All-Star? En el All-Star Baseball 2001 de Acclaim, eso es lo que tendrás que ser para estar en el banquillo con los profesionales. Este juego para un solo jugador para PSX lleva a todos tus equipos favoritos de la MLB a la pequeña pantalla con una gran variedad de opciones de juego. Elige tu equipo favorito y pasa por una temporada completa o llega directamente a las eliminatorias para demostrar que eres el mejor. Lleva el juego a un nuevo nivel con un juego de estrellas, donde los mejores jugadores de la MLB vienen a mostrar sus habilidades. En esta versión hay un sistema de bateo mejorado, así como listas actualizadas, mejor IA de ordenador y gráficos mejorados. Asegúrate de practicar con la interfaz de bateo mejorada, porque el siempre popular Derby de Home Run también hace su regreso. BOLA DE BASE ESTELAR 2001... ¡atrápala!
Game.Title: All-Star Baseball 2001

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Chou Gals! Kotobuki Ran (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Game adaptation of the comic and TV anime title of the same name. Players answer questions posed by characters from the original story and collect items. The collected items can be used to change clothes.
Game.Title: Super Gals! Kotobuki Ran 2: Miracle Getting

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Tony Hawk's Pro Skater (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Esta es la primera versión portátil del popular juego de skate de Tony Hawk. Se parece poco a la versión original de Playstation. En realidad, se compone de dos eventos diferentes, un half pipe y un modo carrera.
El modo Half Pipe se ve desde una perspectiva lateral, como en el clásico juego Skate or Die, donde realizas trucos para lograr la puntuación más alta posible. El modo carrera se ve desde una perspectiva desde arriba, donde el objetivo es realizar trucos y llegar a la meta en el menor tiempo posible.
Game.Title: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Indiana Jones and the Infernal Machine (U) (M3) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Mientras que las otras versiones del primer juego de Indiana Jones en casi una década son aventuras de acción en 3D inspiradas en Tomb Raider, esta edición es diferente, ya que se ve desde arriba en pseudo-3D con movimiento multidireccional. La trama implica a unos comunistas que intentan reconstruir una antigua máquina del tiempo, cuyas piezas están repartidas en 19 niveles.
En cada uno de ellos hay que resolver puzzles basados en gran parte en interruptores, y diferentes rutas para completarlos. Indy está armado con una pistola, una ametralladora, granadas y su omnipresente látigo. Cada nivel tiene una contraseña y termina con un clip que hace avanzar la historia. Además de los soviéticos, los enemigos son escorpiones, serpientes y medusas.
Game.Title: Indiana Jones and the Infernal Machine

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Vigilante 8 (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Este juego nos sitúa en el oeste de los EE.UU. durante una época de escasez mundial de petróleo en 1976. OMAR (Oil Monopoly Alliance Regime) está haciendo dinero de la escasez de combustible, excepto en los EE.UU, que no dan su brazo a torcer. Para ello, OMAR contrata al mejor terrorista que $ 100 millones podrían comprar: Sid Burn. Su trabajo, ayudado por 5 coyotes contratados, es destruir todas las refinerías de gas en el suroeste de los EE.UU. para que OMAR pueda poner a Estados Unidos de rodillas. Más tarde, cuando los precios del gas se volvieron salvajes, 6 civiles con el nombre de Vigilantes liderados por el chofer de camiones Convoy, luchan contra los Coyotes en diferentes áreas para evitar que OMAR triunfe.
Game.Title: Vigilante 8

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Cyborg Kuro-chan 2 - White Woods no Gyakushuu (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: The second stage of the game adaptation of "Cyborg Kuro-chan," which has become an anime as well as a comic book. The game features more intense enemy attacks and thrilling battles, and the number of objects that can be destroyed in the game has also been greatly increased. The game also allows players to use a variety of weapons by entering passwords that have been published in magazines such as "Comic Bon Bon.
Game.Title: Cyborg Kuro-chan 2: White Woods no Gyakushū

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Maya the Bee & Her Friends (E) (M3) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Maya the Bee & Her Friends is the first game based on Maya the Bee, a world famous German book, comic, and animated cartoon series. This licensed title is based on the animated cartoon series.
In the game evil spiders have kidnapped insects and asking for honey as ransom. It is up to Maya and her friends to thwart their evil schemes.
The game has the player control three insects one at a time, but together on the same screen, Maya the bee, Willy the bee and Flip the grasshopper. Each insect has its own abilities. Maya can pull levers and Flip allows the others to leap to higher places. In each of the 120 levels an insect has to be saved and the three have to combine their skills to puzzle their way through the spider's web, in a similar vein as The Lost Vikings.
The game was released in Europe only and is identical to The New Adventures of Mary Kate and Ashley, but with a different license. The same engine was later also re-used in Mary-Kate and Ashley Get a Clue.
Game.Title: Maya the Bee & Her Friends

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Guruguru Town Hanamaru-kun (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: The students spend a day with "Hanamaru," the main character from the TV anime, playing mini games such as quiz, hide-and-seek, and shiritori.
Game.Title: Guruguru Town Hanamaru-kun

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Bass Masters Classic (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Bass Masters Classic es un juego para Game Boy Color en el que puedes participar en un torneo de pesca de lubinas. El juego presenta condiciones climáticas y horas del día variables, una variedad de señuelos y un comportamiento realista de los peces. Puedes jugar en modo torneo y práctica. El primero te permite competir y clasificarte para el torneo Bass Master Classic. En el modo de práctica, puedes elegir por ti mismo con qué clima, hora y lugar de pesca te gustaría jugar. El juego consiste en observar la línea desde el ángulo de la "cámara de señuelo". Una vez que un pez atrapa el cebo, debe presionar rápidamente el D-pad para enrollarlo.
Game.Title: Bass Masters Classic

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Guruguru Garakutas (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: An RPG that goes back and forth between the real world and another world, where junk picked up in the real world can be turned into friends and items in the other world. Use them to defeat the evil empire.
Game.Title: GuruGuru Garacters

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Gekisou Dangun Racer - Onsoku Buster Dangun Dan (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: The game is based on the popular "Dangan Racer" hobby. Purchase machines and parts, customize them, and try to win the championship. There are also original parts for the Game Boy version.
Game.Title: Gekisou Dangun Racer: Onsoku Buster Dangun Dan

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Papyrus (E) (M6) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Papyrus es un juego de plataformas basado en el cómic belga y la serie animada del mismo nombre de Lucien de Gieter. En el juego, juegas como Papyrus, un joven egipcio, en un escenario del antiguo Egipto. La princesa Theti ha sido secuestrada por el malvado Sumo Sacerdote Seth, que quiere apoderarse del poder de su padre, el faraón. Una vez que rescates a Theti, también podrás jugar como ella. El juego presenta controles típicos de plataforma, donde puedes moverte hacia adelante y hacia atrás, saltar, atacar; golpeando o tirando piedras, escalar y colgarse de enredaderas y grietas. Hay 21 niveles en total para jugar, con siete batallas de jefes mezcladas. Se puede desbloquear un nivel secreto usando la "Ubi Key", que se activa conectando dos GBC que juegan Papyrus a través del puerto de infrarrojos.
Game.Title: Papyrus

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Godzilla - The Series - Monster Wars (U) (M3) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Aliens are creating mutants on Earth, and it is up to Godzilla to save the planet from the giant monsters in GODZILLA THE SERIES: MONSTER WARS. You take control of the giant lizard in 10 levels of action that take place in deserts, cities, and underwater. Free-scrolling technology gives you total control of Godzilla, and new cross-hairs improve the accuracy of Godzilla?s attacks that include fireball, tail whip, bite, claw, stomp, and flame breath. As an added bonus, all of the attacks can be linked together for unlimited combinations. And you are going to need those combinations to destroy the 16 types of enemies that Godzilla will face. Try to save the planet from giant monsters and aliens in GODZILLA THE SERIES: Monster Wars.
Game.Title: Godzilla: The Series: Monster Wars

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Rox (E) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Bunches of dice are falling from the sky, and it's up to you to arrange them the right way! In the grand tradition of puzzle classics like TETRIS and DR. MARIO comes this white-knuckle test of your reflexes. Replacing the usual bunch of plummeting shapes with six-sided dice, ROX adds an element of dominoes into the mix. Your real moment-to-moment challenge is to match one die with another, using the pair to eliminate the dice that lie in between the two.
Game.Title: Rox

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Beauty and the Beast - A Board Game Adventure (E) (M5) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Disney's BEAUTY AND THE BEAST: A Board Game Adventure packs the personality and fun of the popular Disney characters into a wild board game filled with a variety of mini-games. Select your favorite BEAUTY AND THE BEAST character and play against three opponents as you race to the finish line. Since everything depends on the roll of the dice, there is a bit of luck involved but skill enters into the mix when you land on one of the mini-game squares. When you do, you'll be whisked to one of 10 side games that will test your reflexes, memory, and skill. Up to four players can play this game by passing the system around after each turn no link cable required! If you want to try something a little different when playing by yourself, challenge the game's Story mode, where you must race the villainous Gaston to the finish of each board.
Game.Title: Beauty and the Beast: A Board Game Adventure

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Rugrats - Totally Angelica (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Rugrats: Totally Angelica is based on the Daytime Emmy-award winning animated television series Rugrats. The game is aimed at girls and prominently features the character Angelica from the series.
Angelica has to star in a fashion show, and on top of that she lost her doll in the shopping mall. As Angelica you have to enter the Fantasy World Shop to save her. The Mall has five floors and the Fantasy World Shop is at the top, you have to complete each floor before you can advance to the next. Mini-games include solving picture puzzles, catching cookies, lead yarn through a maze. Each mini-game is rewarded with jewelry, clothes and make-up. All these are necessary to win the fashion show.
Game.Title: Rugrats: Totally Angelica

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Shaun Palmer's Pro Snowboarder (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: What TONY HAWK'S PRO SKATER did for skateboarding, SHAUN PALMER'S PRO SNOWBOARDER will do the same for snowboarding. Take your shot at building a pro legacy with the help of the legendary snowboarder Shaun Palmer. Four real-world boarding locales will challenge you to the max, and there are 16 total courses to learn and master. The object of the game is to make your way up the ladder of all-pro snowboarders, earning higher rankings as you learn new tricks. Many snowboarding games emphasize speed and racing, but SHAUN PALMER'S PRO SNOWBOARDER is mostly about the tricks. With literally dozens of awesome maneuvers to try out, the game ensures that things will never get dull. The game's graphics rival those of full-sized consoles, and there's a kicking soundtrack to keep your adrenaline pumping. If you have a craving for extreme sports, this is the perfect way to get your fix without breaking a leg in the process.
Game.Title: Shaun Palmer's Pro Snowboarder

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Doraemon Memories - Nobita no Omoide Daibouken (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Doraemon Memories: Nobi Dai no Omoi Izaru Daibouken is an Action game, developed by SAS Sakata and published by Epoch, which was released in Japan in 2000.
Game.Title: Doraemon Memories: Nobita no Omoide Daibouken

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Men In Black - The Series (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Based on the cartoon series of the same name, MEN IN BLACK: The Series begins with aliens invading the Earth. It is up to a covert organization, known only as Men In Black, to stop the invasion. You take the role of Agent J as he hunts down 12 different alien races, including the Skraaldians and the Fmeck. Luckily, J has a wide range of weapons to help him put an end to the alien menace; most notable is the Noisy Cricket. While most aliens are relatively easy to spot, some can change shape and will not reveal themselves until J gets close to them so keep your eyes peeled. When a stage is cleared, you are treated to an animated sequence that advances the plot. Will Agent J be able to save the world? Play MEN IN BLACK: The Series and find out.
Game.Title: Men in Black: The Series

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Battleship (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Now it's your turn to sink your opponent's battleship in this Game Boy Color rendition of the classic strategic board game. Players deploy all four of their ships to different areas on a grid, and take turns firing shots at various parts of their opponent's grid. Hit each ship the required number of times, and the ship is removed from play. In a unique twist on the classic game, each ship has new weapons. For the solo player, there are 48 missions to complete with animated full-color cutscenes to inspire you to victory! The real challenge however, is taking on a human opponent via a link cable. Forget setting up the board and looking for missing pieces, this is the real way to play Battleship!

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Test Drive 2001 (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
This handheld Test Drive game lets you drive 13 licensed sports cars through 12 locations and 48 tracks. The action is viewed from an isometric perspective and some of the locations you'll drive through are Germany, Sydney and Washington. You start the game with a Lotus Elise, but as you gain more money you'll be able to buy other cars like Mustangs and Jaguars.
The game offers three modes. The first one, Single Race, involves beating the clock and other computer opponents on any of the tracks using any of the cars. In the tournament mode, you can earn extra money to buy new and better cars, or to upgrade your current car. You can also unlock additional tracks. In the Cop Chase mode, you take control of a police car and have to pursue the computer controlled racers. The game also have a two player mode allowing you to compete using the Link Cable.
Game.Title: Test Drive 2001

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Deer Hunter (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: The popular pursuit of hunting comes to the portable screen in DEER HUNTER for the Game Boy Color. You play as a hunter looking to catch a nice trophy in one of four different areas using three different weapons. Hunt deer with a shotgun, a rifle, or a bow, using slightly different tactics with each. If you want to be successful, you'll have to use real-world hunting strategies. Search for droppings or other signs of movement to find the best area to wait in. Once there, use one of an assortment of tools to help you catch your prey: mask your odor with a cover scent, use a tree stand to camouflage yourself, or lure the deer with a powerful musk, a deer call, or an antler rattle. It's up to you to decide how to catch the deer; some methods are more efficient than others, so you'll have to find the one that works best for you. Detailed graphics and digitized sound round out the experience for would-be hunters.
Game.Title: Deer Hunter

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Antz Racing (U) (M6) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Based on the computer animated film Antz produced by DreamWorks, this game represents the racing challenge between 6 main characters (Z, Bala, Weaver, Mandible, Cutter, and Azteca).
Each character has own racing machine as well as parameters for Resistance, Holding, and Speed. There are two game modes: Quick Race and 4 Seasons Championship. During Quick Race player choose the season and the track based on random selection. During 4 Seasons Championship player should win each race to earn a password and progress further.
The gameplay represents a race between four drivers in top third-person view on several laps. Player should control selected driver, collect different power-ups, speed up, avoid obstacles, jump in machine, shoot, etc. to win a race. When damage level of the machine reaches its critical point, the machine will stop for some time to be repaired.
The game has three difficulty levels and is available in English, German, Dutch, Spanish, French, and Italian languages.
Game.Title: Antz Racing

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Roland Garros French Open (E) (M6) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Roland Garros French Open is the only appearance of the franchise on the Game Boy Color. Less of a serious simulation of tennis than other versions, the handheld edition features cartoony 2D graphics and outrageous court locations.
All-in-all, the game includes eight different players and twelve different tournaments. Only five players and four tournaments can be selected from the start, the others are unlocked by winning events. The starting tournaments are realistic grand slam events: the Roland Garros French Open (the only one with a license), the English Open (i.e. Wimbledon), the US Championship and the Australian Cup, on clay, grass or turf. Winning them unlocks the more unusual locations: from street and beach tournaments to far-out events in the Antarctic or on the moon.
All events are single elimination, starting at the quarter finals. Matches follow original rules, and are seen from a standard perspective behind the controlled player. All characters (players, officials and fans) are drawn in a cartoony style with oversized heads. The controls allow for a variety of moves including backhand and forehand shots, volleys and lobs.

Each event requires a mix of speed, stamina, and timing to succeed itâ€™s all about the button mashing! Can you win all the events and become the ultimate champion? Full-colored, detailed graphics bring the knuckle-busting action to life. Use the Game Boy Link Cable to hook up with a friend and challenge him or her to a two-player contest to see who can win the most medals. Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Project S-11 (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: When a vicious crew of aliens decides to hone in on Earth and do some damage, you're the planet's only hope for salvation. You'll benefit from a complete statistical readout that adorns the right side of your screen, keeping you abreast of all necessary information: your score, your ship's armor level, and the number of bombs you have stored up for combat. Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Hanasaka Tenshi Tenten-kun no Beat Breaker (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Hanasaka Tenshi Tentenkun no Beat Breaker es un híbrido del juego Simon y un juego de rompecabezas de combinaciones. Se requieren cuatro botones para jugar: izquierda y derecha en el Control Pad, y los botones A y B. La pantalla del juego se divide por la mitad. La mitad superior contiene ocho columnas, seguidas de una línea rayada y luego un área blanca vacía. A la izquierda de la pantalla del juego está la barra de tiempo. A medida que completa rondas, la barra aumenta. Cuando la barra llega a la parte superior del reloj, el nivel está completo. Si su área blanca se llena más allá de las líneas rayadas, el juego ha terminado. Cada ronda tiene ocho notas tocadas en un ritmo específico. Después de tocarlas, vuelven a tocar, y esta vez, después de tocar cada nota, los círculos caen por las columnas.
Game.Title: Hanasaka Tenshi Tenten-kun no Beat Breaker

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Robin Hood (E) (M6) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Robin Hood es un juego de acción al estilo de The Legend of Zelda. Controlas a Robin Hood desde una perspectiva de arriba hacia abajo. Tendrás que explorar, luchar contra enemigos, resolver acertijos y adquirir elementos para progresar en el juego. Puedes disparar a los enemigos con flechas o golpearlos con un bastón o una espada. El sistema de orientación del juego permite al jugador fijar un objetivo mientras camina en otras direcciones. Los artículos adquiridos se pueden comprar y vender y se puede hablar con los personajes NPC para obtener pistas y progresar en la trama. El juego cuenta con quince niveles.
Game.Title: Robin Hood

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Chibi Maruko-chan - Go Chounai Minna de Game dayo! (J) [C].rar
Game.Notes: A board game based on the manga "Chibi Maruko-chan". Roll the dice and go around the town to find the hidden treasure of memories. Up to four players can play at the same time.

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Top Gear Pocket 2 (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Another round of Top Gear rally action on the GBC. On this occasion, depending on where you finish each race, you are awarded points. These points then go towards improving the stats of the rally car you are using (speed, braking, acceleration and top speed).
Championships are split into seasons, each harder then the last. You can opt to change the weather conditions (day, night, sunny, rain, snow) or practise on the track to get used to the corners and timing.
You can also play against a friend in two player mode.
Game.Title: Top Gear Pocket 2

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\NBA In The Zone (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Slam-dunk your way to victory in this game that supports five players. Prepare for basketball video gaming at its finest with three-pointers, hoop shots and more. You'll hit the court in Konami's In the Zone.

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\V-Rally - Championship Edition (E) (M4) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Elige entre cuatro coches de rally del mundo real: Peugeot 306 Maxi, Mitsubishi Lancer WRC, V-Rally Ford Escort WRC y Subaru Impreza WRC. y compite en 40 pistas de lugares exóticos como Indonesia, Córcega, Nueva Zelanda, los Alpes, Reino Unido, Grecia, Argentina, Italia y Suecia. El terreno de cada pista afecta a la tracción del vehículo y debes tener cuidado porque la nieve, la tierra y el asfalto hacen que tengas que pilotar en cada una de las superficies de forma diferente. Además del terreno, estate atento a obstáculos como rocas, mareas negras, barrancos y saltos.

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\1942 (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: 1942... tú y el atrevido piloto de caza "Super Ace" están involucrados en realistas, emocionantes y desafiantes batallas de alto vuelo con el enemigo. Sobre tierra, mar y aire, tu propia habilidad y destreza... combinada con la maestría de vuelo de Super Ace, se batirán en duelo con los pilotos enemigos en cazas y bombarderos. 1942... son aviones que despegan y aterrizan en portaaviones oceánicos... interrumpen las formaciones enemigas listas para atacar... interceptando a los guerreros aéreos enemigos a los que debes derrotar "volándolos del cielo". ¿Será la victoria? ¿O la derrota? ¡Está en sus hábiles manos!

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Test Drive Off-Road 3 (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Some cars should stay on the pavement, while others are designed to go where no other vehicle has gone before. Those are the vehicles included in TEST DRIVE OFF ROAD. You can choose from four different vehicles: a Hummer, Land Rover Defender 90, Jeep Wrangler and Chevrolet K-1500 Z71. In addition to the four starting vehicles six more become available with extended play and include a monster truck, dune buggy, stock car, hot rod, Mini Cooper, and an off-road beetle. When you are ready to race there is a Mixed League and Class League to choose from. Mixed League is open to any vehicle and Class League restricts the entries to vehicles of a particular type. While you are racing the 12 tracks offer three different surfaces including dirt, snow, and rocks. Try to master the elements and go where other cars can't with TEST DRIVE OFF ROAD.
Game.Title: Test Drive Off-Road 3

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Extreme Sports with The Berenstain Bears (U) (M5) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Get extreme with Mama, Papa, Brother, and Sister Bear in their first Game Boy Color game, EXTREME SPORTS WITH THE BERENSTAIN BEARS! In this single-player game you'll control the members of the family as they participate in an assortment of extreme sports events. Use Brother or Sister Bear in kayaking, dirt boarding, biking, and luge, or take the whole family in the river rafting and toboggan sequences. All of the events take place from an overhead perspective, which provides the best view of the playing field. In each event you can perform a wild range of tricks and stunts to gain speed and shave seconds off the clock. Can you beat the high scores and become the best bear you can be? Well-animated characters set on colorful, detailed backgrounds ensure a bright presentation.

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Grand Theft Auto 2 (E) (M5) [C][!].rar

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Maus, Die (E) (M4) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Die Maus is an action / puzzle game based on the German children's television show Die Sendung mit der Maus (The show with the mouse). You control both main characters of the show, the mouse and the elephant, in a search for the duck who has disappeared. The levels of the game are isometric puzzles. Both characters must reach the exit using and combining their different abilities. The mouse, for instance, is larger than the elephant, but the elephant is able to push heavy objects around. The game contains more than 150 puzzles in 5 different game worlds.

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Noddy and the Birthday Party (E) (M4) [C][!].rar

It's Big-Ears' Birthday! Can you help Noddy collect things for the party? Explore Toyland and take part in 10 exciting adventures.

Just some of the fun you'll have with Noddy!
- Specifically designed and tested for younger childrennn- Encourages recognition of left and right, numbers, colours and objectsnn- Different skill levels cater to a range of abilities and ages from 3 upwards

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\NBA In The Zone 2000 (E) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: NBA in the Zone 2000 es un juego de baloncesto con licencias oficiales. Game.Notes: Software for raising popular pets, ferrets. While feeding, cleaning, and taking care of your ferret, you can also play dress-up and mini-games. As your ferret's abilities improve, you can aim to win prizes in the "Ferret Show.

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Elie no Atelier GB (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: The latest in the popular RPG series, in which users gather materials and mix them to create a variety of items. The objective is to train fairies to become full-fledged alchemists while completing requests.
Game.Title: Elie no Atelier GB

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Inspector Gadget - Operation Madkactus (E) (M6) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: El malvado Dr. Claw está a punto de liberar el mortal virus MadKactus en el mundo, y el inspector Gadget debe detenerlo. Dado que Gadget siempre necesita un poco de ayuda, su sobrina Sophie y su perro Sultán están listos para hacer su contribución. Tú, como el enigmático Inspector, tendrás que abrirte camino a través de 20 niveles que abarcan cinco mundos diferentes. Afortunadamente, muchos de sus famosos gadgets están disponibles para ayudar, incluidos el helicóptero, los brazos de resorte, los patines propulsados por cohetes y el sombrero de martillo. Si hay algo que no puedes hacer como Gadget, puedes cambiar de personaje y usar Sophie o Sultán para superar un obstáculo o resolver un rompecabezas. ¡Reúne tus gadgets y prepárate para salvar al mundo del Dr. Claw!
Game.Title: Inspector Gadget: Operation Madkactus

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Hexcite - The Shapes of Victory (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Hexcite es un juego de rompecabezas que se juega en un campo de juego con forma de panal. En el centro hay un hexágono; seis hexágonos más componen todo el campo de juego. Debido al juego por turnos, dos personas pueden jugar usando un solo sistema. También se admite el modo de enlace de dos jugadores. Los jugadores comienzan colocando una forma geométrica (triángulo, hexágono, paralelogramo, etc.) en el hexágono central. La CPU o el oponente humano luego coloca otra forma adyacente (y tocando completamente en un lado) a una pieza jugada previamente. Los jugadores obtienen puntos de bonificación por completar cualquier hexágono completo. Gran parte de la estrategia en este juego consiste en engañar a tu oponente para que te deje recibir una bonificación. También se puntúan bonificaciones por colocar una pieza de modo que dos bandos aporten una puntuación. El juego termina cuando se han jugado todas las piezas, o si no se pueden jugar las piezas restantes. En ese caso, se restan puntos por las piezas restantes, en función de la complejidad de la forma (se restan el doble de puntos para un hexágono en comparación con un triángulo). En Japón, este juego ha visto varias versiones de Windows, e incluso se ha lanzado como un juego de mesa.
Game.Title: Hexcite: The Shapes of Victory

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Asterix - Search for Dogmatix (E) (M6) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Asterix y Obelix (basado en la serie de cómics franceses), deben emprender un viaje desde los bosques de Francia hasta los coliseos de Roma. Su objetivo es encontrar el adorable perro de Obelix Ideadix. Los jugadores toman el control de Asterix u Obelix, y deben correr y saltar a través de varios niveles bien dibujados y coloridos en este juego de aventuras de desplazamiento lateral.
Este título es algo no lineal, y permite a los jugadores elegir el orden en el que visitar las etapas, así como los numerosos mini-juegos. La pantalla de selección de escenario es un mini-mapa, y después de seleccionar para jugar ya sea Astérix u Obelix, los jugadores pueden visitar el estadio del jefe, la posada (energía extra, pistas y contraseñas se encuentran aquí), así como el mini-juego. Estos mini-juegos están disponibles en la pantalla de título bajo la opción "Instant Fun". Varían de un juego estilo "Memory" a eventos humorísticos como "Throw a Roman Mini Game".
Tanto Astérix como Obelix juegan de manera diferente ya que tienen habilidades y limitaciones individuales. Asterix es más ágil, puede correr más rápido y saltar más alto, mientras que Obelix es más poderoso (es capaz de atravesar a través de algunas paredes), pero notablemente más lento. Estas diferencias se destacan por los obstáculos presentados en las etapas - hay muchos saltos a hacer, así como muchos enemigos (soldados romanos, jabalíes, centuriones) para deshacerse. En la búsqueda para encontrar Ideafix, es vital recoger las llaves ocultadas dentro de los niveles para hacer disponibles nuevas áreas. Del mismo modo, también es importante recoger las monedas de los enemigos abatidos, ya que permiten las compras en cada posada, (¡dirigidas por el mismísimo Getafix!).
Game.Title: Asterix: Search for Dogmatix

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Bugs Bunny - Crazy Castle 4 (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
Tu misión es encontrar el camino hacia el misterioso Crazy Castle. Pasarás por una amplia variedad de lugares en los que te encontrarás con personajes familiares de Looney Tunes como Taz, Yosemite Sam, el Coyote, el pato Lucas y Elmer Gruñon.
Bugs Bunny puede subir escaleras, saltar cuerdas y resortes, y usar una gran cantidad de elementos como martillos para romper rocas, zanahorias para reponer salud, armas para noquear enemigos y picos para trepar rocas.
En cada uno de los más de 60 niveles tendrás que encontrar ocho llaves para abrir la puerta al siguiente nivel. Varias trampas te bloquearán el paso, incluidos suelos de hielo, cintas transportadoras, suelos móviles y plataformas que se desintegran al pasar por encima.
Game.Title: Bugs Bunny: Crazy Castle 4

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\720 Degrees (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Súbete y cuelga diez mientras te estrellas en las esquinas, te desvías en las aceras y saltas sobre los habitantes de Skate City, un mundo de fantasía para patinadores en el que se puede patinar prácticamente en cualquier superficie. Da vueltas y vueltas alrededor de los luchadores callejeros, lanzadores de Frisbee, cuerpos duros y abejas asesinas que abarrotan las calles de la ciudad. Perfecciona tus habilidades y lleva tu actuación a los parques de patinaje donde competirás por medallas y dinero en competiciones de descenso, salto, rampa y slalom. Dispara a los tubos, "coge aire" mientras vuelas por las rampas - domina todos los movimientos incluyendo los peligrosos 720. Necesitarás todas las ventajas para convertirte en campeón del mundo del patinaje.
Game.Title: 720 Degrees

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Turok 3 - Shadow of Oblivion (UE) (M4) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes:
In Turok 2 when Primagen's Lightship was destroyed, the explosion created a shockwave through out the universe. This effect nearly ends the life of Oblivion, a 'thing' the drifts through space, consuming anything that ends up in its way. Also during this explosion, a new world was created. In this world lies the Turok family tree, and Oblivion knows that the only way the pain the lies within can be stopped, is to destroy the Turok line.
The third title in the Turok series adds two characters to play instead of one, new weapons (as well as some old favourites) and a highly detailed soundtracks with cut-scenes detailing the storyline as you go along.
Game.Title: Turok 3: Shadow of Oblivion

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Nations, The - Land of Legends (E) (M2) [C][!].rar

Only by these three heroes working together can the fire breathing monster be defeated, but they need your help. Can you help guide them to victory?
Game.Title: The Nations: Land of Legends

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\International Rally (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: International Rally is a rally game with 20 courses and 14 cars which differ in speed, acceleration and adhesion. During the tournament, the player has the possibility to upgrade the car, e.g. a better engine or a speed enhancement, and adjust the damper and tires according to the known weather conditions of the next race. The effectiveness of the car components wears down over the course of the tournament. Other available playing modes are single rallies, time races and duels with a human opponent.

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Cyborg Kuro-chan - Devil Fukkatsu (J) [C][!].rar

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Pocket Soccer (U) (M6) [C][!].rar

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\VIP (E) (M5) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Únete a la ferviente y sexy Vallery Irons (Pamela Anderson) y al resto del equipo VIP mientras te embarcas en misiones criminales para proteger a un famoso cirujano plástico del gángster más famoso de Los Ángeles. Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Hamster Club (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Hamster Club is a hamster breeding training simulation game where you aim to become a master breeder. Select one of three animals, "Shigecchi", "Boo-chan" and "Endo-kun", and breed them according to the funds you have available. If you participate in various competitions (cups), you will compete for the ability and kindness of the hamster. Up to 4 hamsters can be kept in a cage at the same time.
Game.Title: Hamster Club

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Uno (E) (M6) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: UNO, el clásico juego de cartas en el que saltas turnos, robas dos y cambias de sentido el juego, llega a Game Boy Color. Hay dos modos de juego: estándar y Desafío. Estándar hace que los jugadores jueguen hasta que alcancen un número específico de puntos, generalmente 1000. Sin embargo, un jugador solo gana puntos cuando se deshace de todas las cartas en su mano. Los puntos son el valor total de las cartas que quedan en manos del oponente. En Desafío, cada jugador tiene una cantidad determinada de puntos, y es eliminado cuando alcanza el total de puntos. El juego continúa hasta que sólo queda un jugador. En ambos modos, puedes jugar contra hasta tres oponentes controlados por computadora. También puedes jugar con un oponente humano a través de un cable Link. Como extra, hay tres cartas nuevas que no forman parte del juego original.
Game.Title: UNO

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Hamster Paradise 3 (J) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: In this work, you can grow your favorite kind of hamster from Golden Hamster, Jungarian, and Roborovski. In addition to the mini rabbit that was popular in the previous work, a squirrel also appeared. There are also plenty of fun mini games to play with hamsters. In addition to familiar games such as ham wheels and ham catches, new games have been added, and there are more than dozens of them. The cage is also transformed into a two-story building. You can enjoy playing around by going up and down. Not only parks and shops, but also amusement parks and schools, where you can go out with hamsters has increased. You can now collect stickers that you can get at various places in the game, and exchange emails with your friends via infrared communication.
Game.Title: Hamster Paradise 3

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Sesame Street Sports (U) [C].rar
Game.Notes: Good sportsmanship is the name of the game in this delightful series of sporting events. All of your favorite SESAME STREET characters are the competitors in these original contests, and winning (for once) is not the most important thing. Take the adorable athletes through six big time sporting events: Guide Grover through a unicycle race, lead Elmo into a roller skating contest, and push Ernie past the rapids in his own bathtub. Big Bird is along to conduct all of the post-game interviews, putting the emphasis of the events squarely on fun and fair play rather than heated competition. The game's controls are easy top learn allowing little gamers to get the hang of things quickly and an in-game tutorial teaches the ins and outs of each wacky sport. The excellent graphics and familiar faces make the game look and feel just like an episode of the classic kids' show. Hand-held sports have never been so fun!
Game.Title: Sesame Street Sports

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Dear Daniel no Sweet Adventure - Kitty-chan o Sagashite (J) [C][!].rar

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Mary-Kate & Ashley - Pocket Planner (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: Is your life totally disorganized? Do you lose track of what you need to do? Have you lost the phone number of the cutest guy in school? Get organized with MARY-KATE & ASHLEY: Pocket Planner for the Game Boy Color. Use the calendar to keep track of all those really important messages and never forget a phone number with the phone book. You can also write super-secret messages to your friends and beam them to another Game Boy Color. In addition to these features, several games have been included. You can help raise Mary-Kate and Ashley's dog, Clue. If you have a question, go to Ask Ashley, and she will check her crystal ball for an answer. If you are completely unorganized and need some help, run out and get MARY-KATE & ASHLEY: Pocket Planner.
Game.Title: Mary-Kate & Ashley: Pocket Planner

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Powerpuff Girls, The - Battle Him (U) [C][!].rar
Game.Notes: One of three POWERPUFF GIRLS games released together on the Game Boy Color, THE POWER PUFF GIRLS: Battle Him cats you in the role of the lovable Bubbles. Bubbles' nurturing personality shines in the video game, as you help her collect power-ups and battle the infamous, evil "Him." She might be an elementary school student, but she'll prove just how dedicated she is to crime fighting, as you help Bubbles shoot her way through level after level of original action. Many of the items that you collect throughout the adventure can be traded for others via friends playing the other POWERPUFF GIRLS games on their systems. Although it's a one-player game, the trading aspect gives the experience a significantly interactive element. Of course, the brilliant sense of humor from the cartoon series is present throughout the adventure, as are all of the other characters you've come to love. Handheld video games just don't get much more creative (or fun) than this.
Game.Title: The Powerpuff Girls: Battle HIM

Game.ApplicationPath: F:\Launchbox\Games\Nintendo Game Boy Color\Toy Story 2 (U) [C][!].rar
